title: stachys major
intro: Stachys major, also known as Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Stachys major include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues. Stachys major is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and can also be used topically as a cream or ointment for skin issues.
